lines.text: Rest assured, I will do so. How do I leave this place?

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: Speak to Zooknock. He will arrange for you to leave.

lines.speaker: Bonzara
lines.text: It looks like you're trying to escape. Would you like some help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I ... uh ... yes.

lines.speaker: Bonzara
lines.text: Right you are.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you. Who are you by the way?

lines.speaker: Bonzara
lines.text: Never mind that child. You should worry more about who you are and the nature of the forces that have driven you here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll ... keep that in mind, thanks.

lines.speaker: Bonzara
lines.text: We WILL meet again, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok...

lines.speaker: Zooknock
lines.text: Well done, human. Bear with me now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: King Narnode!

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: Yes? How is the mission going ... it has been quite some time since I sent you on your way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's over - it's finally over.

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: What do you mean 'over'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I mean 'finished.'

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: Yes, alright. Report on what happened.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: With all due respect sir, if I told you, you would not believe me. I expect Sergeant Garkor will be sending you a full report soon enough.

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: And what of my 10th squad?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They all live - we suffered no casualties.

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: 'We', [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I, uh, I'm part of the 10th squad now. I even have the sigil.

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: Well, now. It appears I cannot argue with that. Garkor obviously thinks highly of you, as do I.

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: No service such as what you have done for me goes unrewarded in my kingdom. I personally made a visit to the Royal Treasury to withdraw your reward.

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: So you're officially a member of the 10th squad then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose so...

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: Well then you had better sign up for training.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Training?

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: Yes. All members of the Royal Guard must complete a mandatory training programme.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I sign up for this?

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: The High Tree Guardian Daero is in charge of the training programme. You should know where to find him by now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What shall we do?

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: Zooknock and I have come up with a plan.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of a plan?

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: I hope you were listening closely. The teleportation spell that was provided will teleport ALL of the 10th squad, no matter where we may be.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: In effect, the spell will break Lumo, Bunkdo and Carado out of the jail for us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you will be teleported straight into whatever trap they have prepared!

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: Indeed. This is where you come in. Do not forget that we are the 10th squad of the Royal Guard, and that we are more than capable of holding our own.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: With your assistance, we should be able to defeat whatever is thrown at us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But how will I join you?

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: Simple. We fool the teleportation spell that you are in fact a member of our squad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: Zooknock knows Glough's grasp of magic well. He believes the spell is linked to the sigils that all of our squad carry.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: It is these sigils that identify us as a member of the squad.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: Welcome to the 10th squad, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: It is a replica Waymottin has made of our squad sigils. If you wear that when the spell is cast, you will be summoned along with the rest of us.

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: You should prepare. Collect your thoughts and belongings and then wear the sigil. Hurry, human, we do not wish to enter this fight without you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All I have to do is wear this sigil?

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: Yes - but do not do so until you are ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there, King Narnode.

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: Good of you to stop by, human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How fares the kingdom today?

lines.speaker: King Narnode Shareen
lines.text: Everything seems fine, as far as I can tell... I will let you know if there is any trouble.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day, High Tree Guardian.

lines.speaker: Daero
lines.text: Hello there. I hear your mission is complete.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: News travels quickly on this tree. I expect you also know that I am to be enrolled in the Royal Guard training programme.

lines.speaker: Daero
lines.text: Indeed I do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How long does it take?

lines.speaker: Daero
lines.text: For you, it should hardly take any time at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then let us begin.

lines.speaker: Daero
lines.text: Enthusiasm. I like that. We will first begin with a series of exercises designed to increase your strength and stamina.

lines.speaker: Daero
lines.text: We then will follow these up by improving your attack and defence techniques.

lines.speaker: Daero
lines.text: You will improve your strength, stamina, attack and defence, but you may choose what you want to focus on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to return to Crash Island.

lines.speaker: Daero
lines.text: You know the routine...

lines.speaker: Glough
lines.text: This isn't the last you'll see of me, human. Mark my words - the monkeys are listening.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you get back in there?

lines.speaker: Lumo
lines.text: Simple: we got caught again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Deliberately?

lines.speaker: Lumo
lines.text: Yes. We are working undercover here. Isn't that right, guys?

lines.speaker: Carado
lines.text: Whatever you say, boss.

lines.speaker: Lumo
lines.text: See.

lines.speaker: Carado
lines.text: Well I'm not complaining - this jail cell is larger than my room in the Grand Tree! It is a little sparse however...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We'll get you out of there soon enough.

lines.speaker: Carado
lines.text: I'm meant to be here now. We're working undercover.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing now?

lines.speaker: Garkor
lines.text: My squad and I are to remain on this island as undercover operatives. I am collecting information on Awowogei and his policies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing now?

lines.speaker: Karam
lines.text: My squad and I are to remain on this island in secret. The monkeys think we are trying to break our friends out of the jail, but we are just biding our time.

lines.speaker: Waymottin
lines.text: Can't you see I'm busy?

lines.speaker: Waymottin
lines.text: Can't talk now.

lines.speaker: Waymottin
lines.text: I'm too busy to talk, sorry.

lines.speaker: Waymottin
lines.text: But if you ever lose your sigil, let me know.
